languages.text: Этот ксенос выглядит как пульсирующий биозавод.
This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.
languages.original_text: Этот ксенос выглядит как пульсирующий биозавод.

traits.locale_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.
This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.
This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

languages.text: 这个异形简直就像一座活生生的化工厂：粘稠的液体在它厚重的表皮下搏动。
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: 这个异形简直就像一座活生生的化工厂：粘稠的液体在它厚重的表皮下搏动。

languages.text: El xenos parece un manufactorum químico andante. Una serie de fluidos viscosos late bajo su densa piel.
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: El xenos parece un manufactorum químico andante. Una serie de fluidos viscosos late bajo su densa piel.

languages.text: Les fluides visqueux pulsant sous la peau épaisse du xénos donnent l'impression qu'il sort tout droit d'un manufactorum.
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: Les fluides visqueux pulsant sous la peau épaisse du xénos donnent l'impression qu'il sort tout droit d'un manufactorum.

languages.text: Bu zeno, yaşayan bir kimyasal üretim tesisine benziyor. Kalın derisinin altında ağdalı sıvılar titreşiyor.
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: Bu zeno, yaşayan bir kimyasal üretim tesisine benziyor. Kalın derisinin altında ağdalı sıvılar titreşiyor.

languages.text: Dieser Xenos sieht aus wie ein lebendiges Chemiemanufactorum ... unter seiner dicken Haut pulsieren zähe Flüssigkeiten.
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: Dieser Xenos sieht aus wie ein lebendiges Chemiemanufactorum ... unter seiner dicken Haut pulsieren zähe Flüssigkeiten.

languages.text: この異形生物はまるで生きている化学工場のよう。厚い皮の下で粘性の高い液体が脈打っている。
languages.original_text: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.

traits.locale_text: この異形生物はまるで生きている化学工場のよう。厚い皮の下で粘性の高い液体が脈打っている。
